prestazioni: AMG M158 6.0L V12 Biturbo (engine code: M158 E60 AL) upgraded with a bespoke Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, billet compressor wheels, and 1.2 bar peak boost, paired with a custom titanium exhaust system by Capristo with 102mm carbon-fiber tips and electronically controlled bypass valves for active sound modulation

Full Motec M150 ECU and PDM (Power Distribution Module) standalone management with custom 4D ignition and fuel maps, integrated with a Pectel SQ6M data logger for real-time telemetry, including individual cylinder pressure monitoring via Kistler 6061B spark-plug-integrated sensors

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for Pagani’s monocoque chassis, and integrated ride-height sensors for active aerodynamics, paired with a bespoke AP Racing 6-piston monobloc caliper upgrade with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors and Pagani-specific brake pads (Ferodo DS3000 compound)
estetica: Full carbon-fiber bodywork replacement with a custom Pagani Zonda Cinque-inspired aero package by Novitec Torado, including a 3D-printed titanium front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via hydraulic actuators), a rear diffuser with integrated LED brake cooling ducts, and a fixed carbon-fiber rear wing with a 1,200mm span and NACA-profile side supports

Bespoke interior reupholstery by Sabelt featuring a full Alcantara and carbon-fiber trim package with diamond-stitching, including a custom roll cage by Matter Italy (T45 steel, 3mm wall thickness) with integrated fire suppression system (AFFF foam, 5kg capacity) and a digital dash cluster by AIM MXS Strada with a 7-inch TFT display and real-time G-force readouts

Custom forged magnesium wheels by HRE (FF15 model, 20x10.5 front / 21x12.5 rear) with a 3-piece modular design, titanium hardware, and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 ZR20 front, 325/25 ZR21 rear) mounted via a pneumatic tire-changing system by Corghi Artiglio Master
